title: Watch signal handling and termination semantics (issue 34)
description: watch signal handling and termination semantics (issue 34)
acceptance_criteria: watch stops cleanly for count (exit 0), timeout (exit 124), SIGINT (exit 130), and SIGTERM (exit 143); the stop reason appears as a terminal {type:end,reason:...} event in --jsonl mode or a stderr line in human mode; the jsonl stream never contains non-JSON lines; an unbounded watch prints a one-time stderr hint; smoke covers all exit paths including kill -INT; specs updated.
